name: Great-Shape Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and granulated sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs one at a time, then stir in the milk.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining flour, baking powder, salt, vanilla, and almond extract.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
5. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
6. Preheat the oven to 300°F (150°C).
7. Grease a cookie sheet once with butter.
8. When ready to bake, roll out the chilled dough on a floured surface to about 1/4 inch (0.25 cm) thickness.
9. Cut out shapes using cookie cutters and place them on the prepared baking sheet.
10. Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until the edges are lightly browned.
11. Allow cookies to cool before serving, especially if icing with thin royal icing. The cookies stay soft but are not fragile.
